backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan HealthCare backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Service, etc.) and exposing shared functions for user management, bookings, Stripe payment integration, access control, and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two doctor listing features (REQ-19 and REQ-20) to their implementation files: DoctorCard.tsx for card display fields and DoctorListingPage.tsx for sorting/filtering controls.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering routing, pages, components, hooks, and styles for the Jeevan HealthCare React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Jeevan HealthCare React SPA, mounting the app at `#root` and loading the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all application routes including public pages, admin, phlebotomist, and doctor portals, wrapped with React Query, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Admin section layout with a sidebar navigation menu that guards access to admin/lab-executive routes, redirecting unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the home page.
frontend/src/components/doctor/DoctorLay: Provides the authenticated layout shell for the doctor portal, including a sidebar with navigation links; redirects unauthenticated users and shows an access-denied screen if the caller lacks the doctor role.
frontend/src/components/DoctorCard.tsx: Reusable doctor card component rendering avatar, name, qualification, specialty, experience, star rating, consultation fee, mode badges (Online/Clinic/Home Visit), availability indicator, and a Book Now button using the Medical Blue theme.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, service links, and contact details including phone, email, address, and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a top emergency bar, logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart badge, and user authentication controls including role-based dashboard routing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and a ProfileSetupModal that appears when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/phlebotomist/Phl: Provides the authenticated layout shell for the phlebotomist portal with a sidebar; redirects to home if the user is unauthenticated or lacks the phlebotomist role.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects name, email, and phone from a newly authenticated user and saves their profile as a patient role via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SpecialtyAccordi: Accordion UI listing medical specialty categories with their specialists; clicking a specialist triggers a navigation or callback handler.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence managing a shopping cart of lab tests/packages, exposing add, remove, update, clear, and price-calculation actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, covering services, user profiles, role checks, bookings, doctor data, and mutations for the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining Jeevan Healthcare brand color tokens (oklch), light/dark mode CSS variables, base typography, and utility classes for brand colors and borders.
frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts: Defines the MockDoctor TypeScript interface and exports a MOCK_DOCTORS array with sample data for multiple doctors including specialties, fees, availability, and bios, used across doctor-related pages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying Jeevan HealthCare's mission, vision, company story, and core values using card-based layout components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCRMPage.ts: Admin CRM page for managing sales leads with status tracking (new, contacted, in-progress, converted, lost), lead creation/editing dialogs, filtering, and follow-up management.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCustomersP: Admin page for managing customers with CRUD operations (add, update, delete/deactivate), search filtering, and a details dialog showing associated patients, backed by React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Displays an admin dashboard with six metric cards (total orders, active orders, completed orders, total users, phlebotomists, pending reports) fetched via the useDashboardStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Lists all customer bookings fetched via useAllBookings, displaying each order's address, description, preferred date, budget, and urgency status in cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPatientsPa: Full CRUD admin page for managing patients, supporting search/filter, add/edit/delete dialogs, and viewing patient vitals, using mutations from useQueries hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Displays a static list of mock test reports with verified/pending status badges and buttons to view or verify each report.
Shows all diagnostic services/packages fetched via useAllServices in a grid of cards, displaying name, active status, category, and description.
Lists all system users fetched via useListAllUsers in cards, showing each user's name, email, role (with icon), and active status.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminVitalsPage: Admin page for managing patient vitals with search/status filtering, add/edit/delete support via mutations, and status indicators (normal, moderate, critical).
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Multi-step booking form page that collects patient details, address, time slot, and payment method, then submits the booking and clears the cart on success.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that lists added tests/packages with prices, allows item removal, shows savings, and navigates to the booking flow on checkout.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Static Contact page displaying Jeevan HealthCare's phone, WhatsApp, email, and social media contact details with clickable links.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAnalytic: Displays doctor performance analytics including completed consultations, average rating, total patients, and success rate using stats fetched via useDoctorDashboardStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointm: Manages doctor appointments with day/week/month view toggle, tabbed status filtering, and accept/cancel/complete actions via useUpdateDoctorAppointment mutation.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorConsulta: Provides a teleconsultation interface with video/audio/chat controls and a tabbed SOAP notes form for documenting patient consultations and prescriptions.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboar: Doctor dashboard overview showing today's appointments, pending prescriptions, earnings, and rating stats fetched from useDoctorDashboardStats with a personalized welcome message.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings: Displays doctor earnings summary including total earnings, pending payments, and monthly earnings fetched via useDoctorEarnings, with an export statement button.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorHelpPage: Renders the doctor Help & Support page with quick-link cards (Training, Compliance, Support Tickets), an FAQ accordion, and a contact/support ticket form.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorPatients: Displays a searchable list of a doctor's patients fetched via the useDoctorPatients hook, showing each patient's demographics, blood group, and relationship with loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileP: Provides a tabbed profile settings page for doctors covering personal info, qualifications, availability, and notification/security settings with static form inputs.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorConsultationPag: Main doctor consultation landing page with a search bar, specialty accordion, consultation mode cards, and a sortable/filterable list of mock doctors. Supports sorting by rating, fee, experience, and today's availability.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx: Specialty-specific doctor listing page that filters mock doctors by URL param specialty and supports search and sort options. Falls back to showing all doctors if no specialty match is found.
frontend/src/pages/HealthPage.tsx: Health tools page featuring a symptom checker that analyzes selected symptoms and returns a severity-based condition result, alongside a vitals tracking tab with mock readings.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Application home page displaying quick service shortcuts, a 'Why Choose Us' section, and a toggleable health packages grid loaded from an API hook with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Orders management page showing mock lab test bookings with status badges, filterable by all/active/completed tabs, and navigation to individual order tracking.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Order tracking page that displays a hardcoded timeline of lab test order statuses with completed/pending indicators for a given order ID from the URL params.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Lists today's assigned sample collections for a phlebotomist, showing patient name, address, scheduled time, test badges, status, and a Google Maps navigation button.
Shows a phlebotomist's daily overview dashboard with four metric cards (total, completed, in-progress, and pending collections) derived from the useSampleCollections hook.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDoctorProfilePa: Displays a public-facing doctor profile page with details like ratings, consultation modes, availability, fees, and qualifications, fetched via mock data using the doctorId URL param.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Renders a page listing the user's verified lab test reports with mock data, showing report ID, order info, test names, and a download PDF button.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Displays a detailed service information page (doctor consultation, medicine delivery, lab tests, diagnostics, etc.) based on a URL slug, showing description, included services, target audience, and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/TestsPage.tsx: Provides a diagnostic tests catalog page with search, category filtering, cart functionality, prescription upload, and a mock list of lab tests with pricing and turnaround times.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, shadows, fonts, and accordion keyframes, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 21) for the Jeevan HealthCare at Home super app, documenting architectural decisions, existing features, known issues, and module/role structure across the React Native frontend and Node.js/MongoDB backend.
